_publications._publicationTitle: COMT Val(158)Met Polymorphism Is Associated with Verbal Working Memory in Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: 40% of our sample had difficulties in basic arithmetic skills according to the cut-offs of the School Achievement Test (i.e., performance below the 25 percentile). However, we found no significant difference between low-achievement and normal-high-achievement groups
details: 40% of NF1 sample had difficulties in basic arithmetic skills according to cut-offs (performance below 25th percentile), but no significant difference in COMT genotype distribution between achievement groups (χ² = 0.952, p = 0.621)
